items.name_cn:
BOOK TOTE Small
Blue and White / Suede
Has a dreamy vintage feel
The bag body features exquisite pure handmade embroidery craftsmanship
Full of texture, the 3D embroidery has a rich grain
Iconic Tiger embroidery with cowhide splicing 🌟
More business-appropriate for commuting
The bag shape is sturdier and more structured
Equipped with a shoulder strap for enhanced practicality
Capacity remains very substantial
Size: 26.5*21*14 cm
Model: 1325#

items.name_cn:
Black and white tiger, Small
DIOR book tote 24 new version
The Jouy print Zoo series is here!
I have to say, Dior really knows how to play
A tote bag you can carry! Simply amazing
A new hit derived from the most classic tote
More and more people love carrying large bags; truly unisex
Whether handheld or crossbody, commuting, gym, or business trips are no problem
Overall structured and won't collapse, I wish I could wear it every day
Large bag lovers can buy with confidence!!

items.name_en: 💙💙 This Dior Book Tote bag, designed by Dior Women's Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, is a flagship piece embodying Dior aesthetics. It can hold various daily essentials, meticulously crafted from blue Denim Dior Oblique jacquard fabric, reinterpreting Dior's classic pattern with an irregular stone-washed effect to showcase modern charm. Small size, featuring a contrasting Christian Dior Paris logo on the front, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship, and can be carried by hand.

Adorned with mint green and off-white Reverse Joules print embroidery throughout, it reinterprets the classic pattern with a contrasting effect, perfect for holding various daily essentials. Medium size, featuring a Christian Dior Paris logo on the front, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship, and can be carried by hand or over the shoulder.

items.name_cn:
Mini Black in stock!!️
Book Tote Mini series, another little cutie. The petite shape is very elegant, especially suitable for summer wear, not as bulky. It's perfectly fine for holding a phone, cushion, lipstick, etc. The bag is carefully crafted from imported calfskin, featuring a classic oversized houndstooth pattern paired with light gold metal letter charms. The look is amazing.
size:21.5*7.5*13cm
7001

items.name_en: Genuine factory goods, ZP grade, authentic quality. We ensure all materials, hardware, stitching, and edges meet 100% authentic original materials.
items.name_cn:
Genuine factory goods, ZP grade, authentic quality. We ensure all materials, hardware, stitching, and edges meet 100% authentic original materials.
Medium BOOK TOTE Handbag
Grey Oblique Print (36.5 x 28 x 17.5 cm)
Designed by Dior Women's Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this Book Tote is a key piece embodying the Dior aesthetic.
Adorned with grey Oblique print throughout, the front features a "CHRISTIAN DIOR PARIS" logo to elevate the style, and can hold various daily essentials.
Medium style, showcasing Dior's iconic craftsmanship, can be carried by hand or over the shoulder.
Front features "CHRISTIAN DIOR PARIS" logo
Includes dust bag
Size: 36.5 x 28 x 17.5 cm
Fits a 16-inch laptop

Exclusive first release on the web.
.
